match_phase_analysis.trend_explanation: Eff drops from 75.1 (start) to 66.2 (championship); Endgame win rate only 0.2

short.tier_summary: Short rallies (≤5 shots): 14 won, 8 lost out of 22. Biggest differentiator: rally ending.

winning_reasons.narrative: Strong shot quality: avg effectiveness 90 vs 63 in lost rallies
Strong attacking initiative: attacking 0% vs 0% in lost rallies

noteworthy_findings.observation: Effectiveness peaks in Start (75.1) and drops in Pre Interval (63.2)
noteworthy_findings.why: A 12 point effectiveness gap between scoring phases suggests inconsistency under different game situations.

noteworthy_findings.observation: Plays better when trailing (74.5) than when leading (66.9)
noteworthy_findings.why: May relax when ahead, or performs better under pressure to catch up.
